title: Build Repository-Specific Qualification
status_reason: The repository-aware qualification implementation, contracts, migrations, routing guard, scorecards, Agents experience, and deterministic tests are complete. Gate C is INSUFFICIENT_EVIDENCE because no eligible frozen founder-suite observations exist for Villani Code, Codex, or Claude Code on this repository; PT7 therefore cannot be reported COMPLETE.

scorecards.reason: authentication is not ready and the route is not production-enabled
strict isolation is unavailable on native Windows and the route is not production-enabled

gate_c.ranking_reason: Every scorecard has zero eligible observations, so comparison or ranking would be materially unmatched and misleading.

migrated: The default configuration gained an additive, versioned repository_qualification_v1 policy block; existing configuration remains readable and unknown policy fields fail closed.
Legacy non-repository capability snapshots are imported only as excluded history and can never create qualification.
Four additive v1 wire contracts were added to the normative and packaged schema sets; existing run bundles remain readable.
The generated Villani Web bundle and packaged Agentd console assets were refreshed from the same verified production build.
files.scope_note: The worktree also contains the immediately preceding, user-authorized PT6 changes documented in docs/PT6_COMPLETION_REPORT.json. This list identifies PT7 additions and PT7-touched shared files; PT6 changes were preserved.

architecture_and_product_decisions: Qualification history is append-only: observations and invalidations are retained, snapshots are content-addressed, and later rollback or reopened-defect amendments change derived state without deleting prior evidence.

The repository key uses Git identity and lineage, task category/difficulty/risk/required capabilities, complete harness/model/provider/serving identity, execution environment, verification-policy version, software versions, and time window.

Backoff is conservative and ordered: exact repository/task profile, repository/category, repository-wide system, then explicitly declared compatible repository cohort. Language and framework metadata never pool evidence.

Only frozen real-founder-work trials with a valid baseline, complete candidate artifacts, authoritative binary verification, resolved infrastructure, required human review, and no corruption, secret, or direct-target mutation are eligible. Every exclusion is persisted by reason.

The policy is repository_qualification_v1: zero eligible observations is experimental; 1-19 with zero false acceptance is provisional; qualification requires at least 20 observations at an approved level, zero known false acceptance, Wilson lower bound above the risk threshold, valid exact conformance, and no severe drift.
Known cost is grouped by authoritative currency. Unknown cost, duration, and review time remain null with explicit accounting; no zero is fabricated.

Harness/model/provider/environment/policy/lineage changes, capability loss, recent reliability breach, false acceptance, and staleness produce drift or invalidation and safely downgrade the current assessment without erasing history.

Automatic routing accepts qualified systems only. When none is qualified, one strongest evidence-backed provisional configured route may be selected with an explicit fallback marker. Experimental systems require a same-run manual override and unsupported systems cannot be overridden.
The semantic verifier contract remains blind to harness identity, route, cost, qualification state, and competing candidates; qualification gates only backend selection before execution.

Gate C requires scorecards for Villani Code, Codex, and Claude Code and validates evidence parity, exact identity, conformance, isolation, unsupported behavior, qualification correctness, and routing eligibility. Empty or partial arms cannot pass.

public_contracts.backward_compatibility: All new configuration and bundle documents are additive. Legacy capability snapshots are preserved as excluded evidence, not silently converted to eligible trials.

coverage: state transitions, inclusion/exclusion, Wilson math, and unknown cost
hierarchical backoff and no language/framework pooling
false-acceptance amendment, drift, lineage, and requalification
append-only invalidation and actionable unsupported state
automatic eligibility and manual experimental override
Gate C pass/fail/insufficient behavior and required scorecards
explicit automatic, provisional, and manual eligibility

updated_integration_coverage: Root quickstarts prove that zero-evidence local-stub runs require explicit --agent-system and --allow-experimental.
Normative and packaged protocol suites validate all four PT7 documents and reject numeric-zero unknown cost.
Agents UI tests cover repository state, observed acceptance, known/unknown medians, sample count, caveat, Doctor, and View evidence.

validation_commands.command: $names = @('gate-c.schema.json','qualification-invalidation.schema.json','qualification-observation.schema.json','qualification-snapshot.schema.json'); $before = @{}; foreach ($name in $names) { $before[$name] = (Get-FileHash -Algorithm SHA256 (Join-Path 'schemas\v1' $name)).Hash }; & .venv\Scripts\python.exe scripts\generate-harness-schemas.py; foreach ($name in $names) { $normative = Join-Path 'schemas\v1' $name; $packaged = Join-Path 'components\villani-ops\villani_ops\schemas\v1' $name; $after = (Get-FileHash -Algorithm SHA256 $normative).Hash; $packageHash = (Get-FileHash -Algorithm SHA256 $packaged).Hash; if ($before[$name] -ne $after) { throw "non-idempotent schema: $name" }; if ($after -ne $packageHash) { throw "schema copy mismatch: $name" } }

end_to_end_artifacts_and_screenshots.screenshot_reason: The in-app browser had no attached target. UI verification is provided by 25 passing Web tests, typecheck, the 58-module production build, format check, and packaged-console asset parity.

known_failures_and_skips: Gate C is INSUFFICIENT_EVIDENCE: all three systems have zero eligible frozen founder-suite observations for this repository.
The two real-harness tests were skipped because VILLANI_REAL_HARNESS_TESTS was not set to 1; no credentials or paid run were used.
Villani Ops skipped two existing host-capability tests on native Windows; Villani Code skipped one opt-in external smoke test.
Codex authentication is not ready. Claude Code cannot prove strict isolation on native Windows. These conditions correctly produce unsupported rather than fabricated qualification.
No screenshot was captured because the in-app browser had no attached target.
Preliminary circular-import, protocol-keyword, routing-fixture, formatting, lint, type, and Web sandbox failures were remediated; their final focused and full suites pass.

security: Qualification imports reject secret-shaped ledger content and eligible evidence cannot be asserted by arbitrary JSON import, but trial patches and raw run artifacts can still contain repository data and require operator review.
Worktree/process isolation is not a kernel sandbox; unsupported environment states fail closed and must not be manually bypassed.
privacy: Repository identity is derived from local Git lineage and stored in local qualification records. Evidence exports can expose repository metadata even when protocol logs are redacted.
data_loss: Qualification evidence is append-only and materialization remains limited to the selected recorded patch. No durable evidence or user source was deleted; only reproducible PT7 temp directories were removed after their resolved workspace paths were verified.
compatibility: Old bundles and configuration remain readable. Legacy capability snapshots do not qualify a system and are preserved as excluded history.
Policy, exact system identity, serving engine, environment, or repository-lineage changes can intentionally downgrade an otherwise successful historical profile.

user_facing_behavior.before: Installed/readiness and provisional harness information was visible, but there was no repository/task-profile qualification ledger, statistical confidence, conservative backoff, drift invalidation, Gate C scorecard, or routing eligibility guard.
user_facing_behavior.after: Agents shows each exact system's repository-specific state, observed acceptance, median accepted-change cost when known, duration, sample count, last tested time, caveat, Doctor action, and evidence action. Users can qualify from frozen trials, inspect status/evidence, append invalidations, and generate Gate C. Automatic selection cannot use experimental systems; a manual experimental run is visibly labeled and cannot itself create qualification.

cleanup.recovery: These were reproducible generated test/config artifacts and were removed permanently after path verification. No durable source or qualification evidence was removed.
